text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Attention! The paperwork to extend Fine Motion's study abroad
period is ready, and the proposal for race admission is written!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Wahaha! Think nothing of it! Tracen Academy takes great pride in
making Umamusume dreams come true. Fine Motion is no exception!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Not to mention—you did a great deal of the work yourself! I must commend your work ethic. It is superb!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However, what remains to be done is... pivotal! Fine Motion, are you
ready?

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
You must obtain parental consent yourself. Your father needs to hear
your goals from you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Understood!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
We've confirmed that both parties are ready to begin. Now... please
allow me to start the call.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The captain readies a screen at eye level, and then a moment later,
we're on video.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: It's been too long, Father.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
Fine... I've seen your proposal, so I'll skip directly to my primary
concern—has your short time abroad dulled your sense of duty to this
country?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Never. I am fully aware of my responsibilities, and it is with nothing
but pride that I endeavor to fulfill them. They are precisely why I
have hesitated to make this selfish request.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
However, I... I can no longer deny my heart. Now, here at Tracen, I
wish so strongly to run!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
...The passions of one's youth are fleeting, but the future they distract
you from will come regardless. Should you indulge in those fantasies,
you'll find yourself miserably unprepared to live without them.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
Fine... You are wise beyond your years. I know you can see how rocky
the path that tempts you is, so tell me—do you wish to take it even
so?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Yes, I do!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You see, Father, it's too late. I have already run with all my heart, a
rival at my side, and felt that burning desire to be faster than anyone!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I can't stop... nor do I wish to. I want to race! I want to push myself,
and see how far my own two legs can take me!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text: ...I see.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
If you are so certain of your choice, I will have you demonstrate your
conviction. Show me that you are prepared, determined... and have
potential worth training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And now, Fine Motion has her father's consent to run in the next
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
One, two... One, two... Whew. I have my work cut out for me, if I'm
going to show Father results.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
This race will draw eyes, and I have a country to do proud... I'll prove
that I've got what it takes!
choice_data_list:
...Don't put too much pressure on yourself,
okay?

...Don't put too much pressure on yourself,
okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What pressure? I'm fine! I couldn't be happier!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I mean... I get to run!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer! I'll pull out all the stops, so train me like there's no
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
True to her word, Fine Motion dedicates herself to practicing for the
tryouts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Days go by, and then...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Inhale... Whew!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Okay! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Security Captain
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. Our preparations are complete. I'll put you through, so please
standby at the monitor.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Behind the screen, Fine's father watches his daughter's gate.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
...As I understand, you are the trainer who first noticed Fine's true
feelings towards racing.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
You know, she's always been a clever one. Fine accepted our family's
duty from an early age, and has played her part perfectly
since—without letting the girl inside show.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text: Now, though... We'll see.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: More... Keep... going! I can still go faster! Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
(Ah, that look. It's been so long, I almost forgot... that twinkle of light
in her eyes.)

text_block_list.name: Young Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ready... Go! Ahahahaha!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of this tryout race is Fine Motion! Fine Motion takes
first! What an amazing performance!

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
...Well. I suppose I, too, should allow myself the occasional selfish
wish. I wish her success—not as the head of our house... but as her
plain, simple father.

text_block_list.name: Fine's Father
text_block_list.text:
(I should have known she'd follow in her sister's footsteps
eventually... Racing is in their blood.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: ...I can't believe it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, I must be dreaming! Father really gave permission for me to race!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! And I believe this calls for a "winner winner ramen
dinner"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Ahem. If you would be so kind...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Would you escort me to the restaurant, Trainer?
choice_data_list: Heh. As you wish, my liege.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we head out to celebrate—and finally put that Ramen
Rampage coupon I'd been saving to use.
